commonLayouts.name: cover
commonLayouts.rule: Light mint gradient or black hero field, large title, restrained subtitle, optional subtle logo.

commonLayouts.name: toc
commonLayouts.rule: Left title/sub copy with right or lower content index; avoid page count clutter.

commonLayouts.name: section-divider
commonLayouts.rule: Centered or left-centered single message with strong hierarchy and minimal supporting elements.

commonLayouts.name: content-top-left
commonLayouts.rule: Top-left title and subtitle, visual canvas below; this is the default content layout.

commonLayouts.name: workflow-flow
commonLayouts.rule: Use repeated stages, arrows, cycle diagrams, or grouped Q/A cards for process explanations.

commonLayouts.name: center-message
commonLayouts.rule: Large centered one-line message; reveal title then subtitle, optionally dim background visual.
